Class TextAreaAppender

java.lang.Object
ch.qos.logback.core.spi.ContextAwareBase
ch.qos.logback.core.AppenderBase<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent>
fun.seabird.util.TextAreaAppender
All Implemented Interfaces:
ch.qos.logback.core.Appender<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent>, ch.qos.logback.core.spi.ContextAware, ch.qos.logback.core.spi.FilterAttachable<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent>, ch.qos.logback.core.spi.LifeCycle
public class TextAreaAppender extends ch.qos.logback.core.AppenderBase<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent>
A custom appender for logging events that outputs log messages to a TextArea component. This appender is specifically designed to integrate with JavaFX applications, allowing log messages to be dynamically displayed in a graphical user interface. It extends ch.qos.logback.core.AppenderBase<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent> to handle log events and update the UI accordingly.

Upon each logging event captured by this appender, it schedules the message to be appended to the designated TextArea on the JavaFX application thread, ensuring thread safety and consistency of the UI updates. This makes it suitable for real-time logging in JavaFX-based desktop applications.

Usage of this appender requires that it be properly initialized and started, typically through configuration in your logging framework setup. Once started, it will capture log events and display them in the TextArea associated with the application's main UI thread.

  • Constructor Details

    • TextAreaAppender

      public TextAreaAppender()

  • Method Details

    • append

      protected void append(ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent event)
      Appends the log message from the provided ILoggingEvent to the TextArea. This method is called for each log event captured by this appender. The log message is appended to the TextArea on the JavaFX application thread to ensure that UI updates are thread-safe.
      Specified by:
      append in class ch.qos.logback.core.AppenderBase<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent>
      Parameters:
      event - the logging event containing the message to be appended to the TextArea.

    • start

      public void start()
      Initializes the TextAreaAppender by associating it with a TextArea from the MediaSorterApplication. This method should be called to start the appender and before it begins handling log events. It ensures that the appender is ready to display messages in the designated TextArea.
      Specified by:
      start in interface ch.qos.logback.core.spi.LifeCycle
      Overrides:
      start in class ch.qos.logback.core.AppenderBase<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent>
